sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-08-31 07:46
- Distance: 21.2 km
- Moving time: 1:55:39
- Elapsed time: 1:56:28
- Elevation gain: 221 m
- Average heart rate: 167.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 181 bpm
- Average watts: 230.9 W
- Average speed: 11 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `7` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.7 bpm`, ranging from `160.2` to `174.7 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `169.8 bpm` (+3.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `180.4 spm`, with a working range of `159.9` to `184.7 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `180.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `180.3 spm` (-0.3 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:28 /km` across `21.168 km` in `1:55:39` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:21 /km` and second-half pace was `5:34 /km` (+13 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.7 bpm` average and `181 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `164.0 bpm` in the first half and `171.3 bpm` in the second (+7.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `1:55:39` out of `1:56:28` elapsed (99.3%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `258.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `71.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `99.6 m` in the first half and `159.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
